title: Water World
body:
# Water World 🌊

**Water World** is an immersive Minecraft modification and datapack that transforms your world into a vast oceanic paradise! This pack raises the sea level to **Y=127**, flooding the terrain and redefining the way you explore and survive. 

## Features
- 🌊 **Raised Sea Level**: The entire world is now a water-filled haven with the sea level set to 127.
- 🏗️ **Spawn Structure**: If no land is close to spawn, you will appear on a simple custom structure, ensuring a safe starting point for your adventure.
- 🏝️ **Biome Adjustments**: Biomes are carefully modified to match with the new sea level.
- 🐠 **Aquatic Adventure**: With land mostly submerged, you'll need to rethink survival strategies—master swimming, explore ocean ruins, and live off the sea.
- ⚙️ **Available as Mod and Datapack**: Choose your preferred method to transform your Minecraft world. Whether you like using mods or datapacks, Water World has you covered.

## Perfect For:
- Building underwater cities or islands
- Survival challenges in an aquatic environment
- Exploring unique, water-themed biomes
- A completely new Minecraft experience!

Dive into the **Water World** today and turn your Minecraft world into a true oceanic adventure!

Let the waves take over and redefine your Minecraft experience!

## Sends

for a water spawn, try seed `aqua`

Seed: `-6845315237593046924`

![Seed: -6845315237593046924](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/4e42543015ad6a88177757df324e4b2b0bf52fb5_0.webp)
